title: Elves Behaving Badly Elves Behavin’ Badly Book + 2 Elf Dolls, A Year In The Life Of Elfie And Elvie A4 Book 24 Colourful Illustrations With 2 x 10'' Elfie and Elvie Dolls
features: Enchanting dolls and book set for young children.
A Year In The Life Of Elfie And Elvie A4 Book with 24 colourful illustrations, is a book made for kids’ imagination
Dolls allow toddlers to pretend or allows parents to play the scenes of the book to make it even more engaging.
The book is A4 Size and the dolls are approx. 10 inches high (25 cm).
